name: Jess Frazelle
description: Explore Jess Frazelle's deep dives into containers, Linux internals, security, and hardware engineering.

llmAnalysis.contextPrompt: You are analyzing a blog post by Jess Frazelle, a prominent engineer known for her work on Docker, containers, and Linux security. She's worked at Docker, Google, Microsoft, and GitHub, and co-founded both Oxide Computer Company and Zoo. She's known for deep technical posts on containers, security, namespaces, and hardware engineering, as well as candid takes on the tech industry.

spiciness.contextPrompt: Jess Frazelle is known for direct, no-nonsense takes on tech topics. Her spiciest content includes critiques of the tech industry, calling out security theater, opinions on container orchestration hype, and candid reflections on working in tech as a woman. She's not afraid to say when something is overhyped or broken.
